name: Spawn of Mephala
location: Vila Theran in Fungal Grotto II, Maj al-Ragath

bonuses.stat: When you deal damage with a fully-charged Heavy Attack, you create a web under the target for 10 seconds that deals 218 Poison damage every 1 second to all enemies within 4 meters. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
